title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第13部分）
content:

All PDAs, tablets and mobile phones will be considered as fixed asset (or Low Value Asset, depending on the cost of the item) under the University’s Fixed Assets (FA) Policy, an asset number will be assigned to the equipment and it should be affixed with the asset tag given by Office of Finance. Refer to the policy in SUTD Central under Office of Finance.

Office Not allowable Equipment Office Furniture Not allowable & Fittings Unless their intended usage are for research labs and/or for storage of research equipment. General furniture and fittings are not allowed. Cost of Not allowable. Renovation Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 11 Form of Acceptance TEMASEK LABORATORIES SINGAPORE UNIVERSITY OF TECHNOLOGY AND DESIGN ACCEPTANCE FORM Please return to TL@SUTD by 15 March 2023 Ref: TL@SUTD-LOA/1-2023 Grant Number: RTDS S 22 14 05 1 Contract Effective Date: 01 February 2023 I accept the grant in the amount of S$100,000 for the TL@SUTD Project entitled “Towards Online Continual Pre-Trained Language Model Maintenance” under the terms and conditions stipulated in the Letter of Award dated 3 January 2023. By signing this Form of Acceptance, I agree that I shall be bound and abide by the said terms and conditions and undertake the obligations in respect of the project. Zhang Shuhao Name: Assistant Professor Designation : Signature: 12-Jan-23 Date: TL@SUTD LOA Sep 2019 TEMASEK LABORATORIES SINGAPORE UNIVERSITY OF TECHNOLOGY AND DESIGN BUDGET PHASING FORM Grant Number: RTDS S 22 14 05 1 Project Title Towards Online Continual Pre-Trained Language Model Maintenance Contract Effcetive Date: 01 February 2023 Project Term: 1 year FY2022 FY2023 TASK REMARKS (S$) (S$) 1 Manpower 20,000. 00 1x Visiting Research Assistant 2 Equipment & Maintenance 15,000 0 1 x GPU Workstation 3 Other Operating Expenses 10,000. 00 47,000. 00 EC2 Usage (8 V100, 64GB Memory) 4 Conference Travel 8,000. 00 Conference Travel and Registration TOTAL 25,000. 00 75,000. 00 I, the Project Principal Investigator, certify that the information given above is true and correct. Name: Zhang Shuhao Designation: Assistant Professor Singnature Date: 12-Jan-23 TL@SUTD LOA Nov 2013
